nasb.text: On the day that you stood aloof, On the day that strangers carried off his wealth, And foreigners entered his gate And cast lots for Jerusalem— You too were as one of them.

esv.text: On the day that you stood aloof, on the day that strangers carried off his wealth and foreigners entered his gates and cast lots for Jerusalem, you were like one of them.

cnv.text: 外地人劫掠雅各財物的日子， 外族人進入他的城門， 為耶路撒冷抽籤； 那時你竟袖手旁觀， 甚至好像他們中間的一分子！

ccb.text: 外族人掠夺雅各的财物， 攻入耶路撒冷抽签分赃时， 你竟然袖手旁观， 就像他们的同伙一样。
